name: Apocalyptic Furry Transit
description:
[Okay, I know it seems weird, Just read the description. Please.]

So, It's an apocalypse. The world is incredibly hard to survive, ice and snow cover all the lands, and there are monsters beyond comprehension wading around in the wastes.

But, a new species more fit for the cold has sprung up: Furries. Or anthros, however you wanna put it. But as usual, survivors have banded together, some good, some bad, all of them big and plump and fluffy to better endure the weather.

Thankfully, your not alone in this world at least. You hear of strange massive vehicles called "Transit Tanks", supposedly a safe haven for a lonely survivor like you. But first you have to find one...

[Okay but seriously, this might have some heavy stuff in it, but most of it probably just big butts like all my other bots. There's only one extra image this time, because it was pretty hard to put together.]

creator: Anonymous1111101
